_comment: EAS Build + EAS Submit configuration. EAS reads this file when you run `eas build` and `eas submit`. Three profiles are defined: 'development' for an Expo Dev Client build with full logs, 'preview' for an installable APK you can sideload onto a phone for QA, and 'production' for the AAB (Android App Bundle) you upload to Google Play Store. The EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL env var is baked into the JavaScript bundle at build time — change it to your real Render URL before building. The OpenAI key is NOT here on purpose: the mobile app never holds it; it only knows the backend URL, and the backend talks to OpenAI on its behalf.

android._comment_serviceAccountKeyPath: Path (relative to code/mobile/) to the JSON service-account file you download from Google Play Console. Required only if you want `eas submit` to upload the AAB for you automatically — uploading the AAB manually through the Play Console UI works just as well.
